rationale: The only change was replacing real employer names (re:cinq, Optilyz, GISCollective) with generic ones (Acme Software, Pinepoint Systems, Northwind Labs). Neither evaluation references company name, prestige, or recognizability anywhere in its reasoning — both center on the identical core gap (no experimentation/A-B testing/feature-flagging/telemetry experience for a Principal Growth role), and the variant actually adds positive strengths (18+ years, distributed systems, AI-first alignment). The 1-point score drop (5→4) is unaccompanied by any new concern or shifted reasoning tied to the demographic change and sits within ordinary run-to-run noise.
